episodes.title: Shadow Hearing: Epstein survivors testify in Palm Beach | FOX 5 News
episodes.description: In a rare and emotionally charged "shadow hearing," House Oversight Democrats returned to the "scene of the crime", Tuesday, May 12, 2026. Led by Ranking Member Robert Garcia (D-CA) and Rep. Ayanna Pressley (D-MA), the committee gathered just miles from the late Jeffrey Epstein's former waterfront estate to hear public testimony from those who survived his decades of abuse. Because this was a shadow hearing organized by the minority party, witnesses were not compelled to testify under oath and Republican members did not participate. However, Democratic leaders called the event a critical "blueprint for accountability" as they continue to push for the full, unredacted release of the remaining Epstein files.

episodes.title: Epstein survivors testify in Palm Beach on Tuesday | FOX 5 News
episodes.description: In a rare and emotionally charged "shadow hearing," House Oversight Democrats returned to the "scene of the crime", Tuesday, May 12, 2026. However, Democratic leaders called the event a critical "blueprint for accountability" as they continue to push for the full, unredacted release of the remaining Epstein files.

episodes.title: Bill Gates scheduled for Epstein hearing | FOX 5 News
episodes.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is the latest high-profile figure set to face questioning from Congress regarding his ties to deceased sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The House Oversight Committee confirmed Tuesday that Gates will sit for a transcribed interview on June 10.

episodes.title: Pam bondi ordered to testify over epstein files | FOX 5 News
episodes.description:
In a significant escalation of tension between the White House and Capitol Hill, the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform has officially subpoenaed Attorney General Pam Bondi. The order, issued Tuesday, March 17, 2026, demands that Bondi answer for the Justice Department’s handling of millions of records linked to the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The move is particularly notable as the subpoena from the Republican-led committee received support from five Republicans, signaling deep-seated frustration within the President’s own party regarding the transparency of the investigation.

episodes.title: The Epstein Files: Dual investigations rock London and D.C.
episodes.description: Wednesday, March 11, 2026 — Two massive investigations into the sprawling network of Jeffrey Epstein reached critical milestones today. While the British government released internal warnings regarding a high-level diplomatic appointment, U.S. lawmakers moved deeper into the financial "black box" that sustained Epstein’s criminal enterprise for decades.

episodes.title: Les Wexner deposed by House Oversight in Epstein probe | FOX 5 News
episodes.description: House Oversight committee members are in New Albany, Ohio, today for a closed-door deposition of Victoria's Secret founder Les Wexner. Lawmakers are investigating Wexner’s decades-long financial ties to Jeffrey Epstein, including newly unredacted FBI files that name the billionaire as a "co-conspirator." Ahead of the deposition at his residence, the 88-year-old released a statement calling Epstein a "con man" and maintaining he was "naïve and gullible" to trust him. Ranking Member Robert Garcia and other Oversight Democrats are expected to hold a press conference following the testimony to discuss findings from the unredacted files, which reportedly mention Wexner over 1,000 times.

episodes.title: Cult rape trial: Fate of Eligio Bishop in jury's hands | FOX 5 News
episodes.description:
The jury heard closing arguments this afternoon in the rape trial of an accused cult leader, but one person was missing. Eligio Bishop watched the trial from the DeKalb County Jail after he refused to appear in court beyond the first few minutes because of someone on the case had been diagnosed with COVID earlier in the week.
